description: You are an assistant editor on an independent film preparing a review screener for the director. The production team shot Scene 42, but the on-set camera audio was ruined by wind noise. Using the raw camera file at /home/ga/Videos/scene42_camera_raw.mp4 (45.0s, 1920x1080, clap at 3.0s) and the clean ADR audio at /home/ga/Music/scene42_adr_master.wav (42.0s, recorded starting from the clap), produce a synchronized 1280x720 H.264/AAC video screener. The screener must have the first 3.0 seconds of the camera video trimmed to sync with the ADR audio (discarding the original audio) and include the studio watermark from /home/ga/Pictures/studio_watermark.png overlaid on the video. Export the final screener to /home/ga/Documents/delivery_package/scene42_director_screener.mp4. Additionally, generate a mono 128kbps MP3 mixdown of the ADR audio at /home/ga/Documents/delivery_package/scene42_adr_mixdown.mp3 and create a JSON manifest documenting these outputs at /home/ga/Documents/delivery_package/delivery_manifest.json.
